change_set: Pin torch==2.1.2 and torchaudio==2.1.2 inside the model-local venv.
Keep the lazy-import patch in place so the minimal english fbank path stays isolated from optional frontends.
Rerun validate_phase1.py without changing fixtures or the repo-native entrypoint.
reason: This changes the runtime family that actually touched the failing API without broadening scope into additional dependencies.
